name: I'm on a small landing
hints: A landing with multiple exits. Read the sign on the slide for a clue.
The slide leads somewhere - GO SLID takes you down. N goes to the sloping hallway.
E leads to a windy hall. U leads to a rickety staircase. The slide is one-way down.
READ SIGN on the slide for important information.
notes: Hub room with multiple paths. The slide goes one-way to the water tank. N=sloping hall (room 9), E=windy hall (room 19), U=rickety staircase (room 20).
